conflict: Gloria and Carina preserve a polished version of Tomas's death and punish deviations with guilt and sarcasm.
consequence: Marisol finds a hidden pre-1990 photo of Gloria and Salvador together, confirming a direct family link.
must_land_beats: Quiet opening: a non-strategic meal with humor, spilled rice, and neighborhood gossip.
Marisol tests dates around Tomas's final week and gets inconsistent answers.
Gloria diverts to religious language whenever specifics appear.
Photo discovery reframes Salvador from outsider to embedded witness.
objective: Probe family memory during an All Souls supper without triggering immediate shutdown.
